name: Paramount Global
description: Global media and entertainment company. Paramount Pictures, CBS, Paramount+, Pluto TV, MTV, Nickelodeon. Post-merger (Viacom + CBS, 2019). 3 distinct security teams.
stack_sources: EDR: CrowdStrike primary, Carbon Black on some endpoints (confirmed)

corporate_security.scope: Enterprise IT, SOC, detection engineering, incident response

content_security.scope: Film/piracy protection, IP theft, pre-release content

streaming_security.scope: Paramount+, Pluto TV, subscriber data, cloud infrastructure
